user_request: Triage all open issues in techx/agentstore

steps.details: Parsed request to triage open issues for repo techx/agentstore.
Loaded manifest for github_issue_triage and found required tool: github_reader.

issues.title: Frontend card does not show required tools
issues.body_summary: Agent marketplace cards are missing tools_required and tags.

issues.title: Health endpoint response is too minimal
issues.body_summary: Backend /health route only returns status and should include service info.

intermediate_result.reasoning: Issue affects frontend display, so it should be labeled frontend and bug.
Issue affects backend API quality, so it should be labeled backend and enhancement.

steps.details: Created suggested labels, priority levels, and assignee groups.
